title: This MCP makes Hermes Agent 10x more powerful
summary: David Ondrej demonstrates Apify MCP Connectors, model context protocol connectors that significantly enhance the capabilities of Hermes Agent. The tool provides universal connectors for integrating various data sources and services with AI agents.
writeup: This video demonstrates Apify MCP Connectors, Model Context Protocol connectors that extend the capabilities of the Hermes Agent. It covers how the tool provides universal connectors for integrating various data sources and services with AI agents. The takeaway: MCP serves as a standard layer for linking external data and services to an agent, broadening what Hermes Agent can access and act on.
